{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = White Fox boundary formation
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[White Fox]] boundary produces illusory bird-calls and shrieks.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[White Fox]] boundary can be activated with ancestral orus fruit.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[White Fox]] boundary is a formation kept in place by seven short banners woven from purple cloth and stitched with white script.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|When activated, the [[White Fox]] boundary summons an [[aura]] of light and dreams to create a cloud of illusions.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
